steps.title: Follow the practical link
steps.content: The underlined portion says the air immediately surrounding mushrooms became cooler. The next sentence says those reductions inspired an air-cooling device, so the observation is central to the practical application.

steps.title: Separate cause and support
steps.content: A wrongly says the observation motivated the earlier study, B limits it to evidence for hypothermia, and D calls it tangential and reverses the experiment's purpose. The underlined finding leads into the device. The answer is C.
